title: Supply Chain Manager - Tata Motors Commercial - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Tata Motors Commercial - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Tata Motors Commercial invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Tata Motors Commercial:
Tata Motors Commercial is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors Commercial!
